codeReview.summary: The baseline-validation-normalization feature successfully fixed the pre-existing formatting issues and established a clean baseline for subsequent feature work. The worker correctly identified and resolved formatting problems in test/predictions_web/controllers/error_html_test.exs (line break needed for long assertion) and config/dev.exs (removed unnecessary 'E' sigil suffixes from regex patterns). All validation commands now pass cleanly. The worker also added the required .factory/ mission infrastructure folder as specified by worker-base guidelines.

summary: PASS: The baseline normalization feature fully achieved its objectives. The pre-existing formatting failure in error_html_test.exs was correctly identified and fixed using mix format. The worker also picked up formatting corrections in config/dev.exs (regex sigil suffixes). The .factory/ mission infrastructure was properly committed, including init.sh, services.yaml, library documentation, and the phoenix-fullstack-worker skill. All validation commands pass (format check, compile with warnings-as-errors, tests, precommit). No code issues or gaps in shared state were identified. The baseline is now trustworthy for feature work.
